channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overloaded skip on alleyway/public pathway, 12th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Murchison Avenue, Albany Park, Greater London

item.title: Dumped vehicles, 12th May
item.description:
2vehicles dumped in Kent house lane causing traffic problems

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress abandoned for days., 12th May
item.description:
Abandoned mattress on the pavement hard to walk past without stepping into road. Attracting additional issues now. Please collect asap. Been here for days. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glasd missing, 12th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Hill Road, Southend, Greater London

item.category: Damage - smashed glass or panels / jagged metal edges on shelter

item.title: Next to 14 Luffield Road: long plank of white wood., 12th May
item.description:
The wood is on the grass very and is partially hidden because the grass is long.

item.title: Abandoned car, 12th May
item.description:
Car left in same position on road near junction of Haslemere Road and Belvedere Road for several weeks. Blue Ford, reg GF62 UJU. Car front numberplate is broken and propped up at windscreen. Car falling into disrepair. MOT and tax expires end of the month according to Gov UK checker.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 95, Haslemere Road, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chain has become detached from the wooden swing, 12th May
item.description:
The chain tethering the wooden swing to the rope has come undone and the bolt has been lost

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kentish Way, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
